CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jan-18-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
Carl Wolf, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff De Angelo Dove
Michael Chambers, Esq. on behalf of defendant Bienvenido B. DelaCruz

After matter was sent to Judge Pro Tem, this matter had settled. Terms of the settlement were as follows: Defendant to pay plaintiff $7,600.00. Each side to bear own costs and attorney fees.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: V. Mu/D. Hakewill Reporter: JoAnn Bryce, #3321 (206)
